name: Caramel Choc. Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch pan.
3. Combine the caramels and 2/3 cup evaporated milk in a heavy saucepan. Heat and stir until blended; keep warm.
4. In a bowl, combine the dry cake mix, melted butter, and 2/3 cup evaporated milk. Mix well.
5. Spread half of the mixture in the bottom of the pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes.
7. Immediately sprinkle chocolate chips over the hot layer; drizzle with caramel mixture.
8. Spread the remaining batter evenly over the top.
9. Return to the oven and bake an additional 15-18 minutes, or until the top looks dry.
10. Cool on a rack; cut into fingers, about 3x1 inch. Makes 3 dozen bars.
